user.title: Beacon Waste Collection
user.description: Found {beacon_count} beacons. Select which to monitor and configure global settings.

data.zone_far: Zone for medium signal (far from antenna)

data_description.selected_beacons: Select beacons to monitor. Each entry shows: Beacon name (MAC address)
data_description.rssi_threshold_min: RSSI above this value means beacon is in 'near' zone (e.g. -50 dBm)
data_description.rssi_threshold_max: RSSI below this value means beacon is lost (e.g. -80 dBm). Between = 'far' zone
data_description.zone_near: Which zone to assign when beacon is near antenna
data_description.zone_far: Which zone to assign when beacon is far from antenna

bin.title: Configure bin {bin_number}: {beacon_name}
bin.description: Beacon: {beacon_name} (MAC: {beacon_mac}). Choose a name and the pickup scheduling mode.

data_description.pickup_mode: Choose 'Calendar' for days of the week + time. Choose 'Boolean entity' to delegate to an external binary_sensor or input_boolean.

bin_calendar.title: Pickup calendar: {beacon_name}
bin_calendar.description: Configure pickup days and exposure time for {beacon_name} (MAC: {beacon_mac}).

bin_boolean.title: Pickup boolean entity: {beacon_name}
bin_boolean.description: Select the entity that indicates when to expose {beacon_name} (MAC: {beacon_mac}). Can be an input_boolean, a binary_sensor from an external calendar or automation.

data_description.pickup_boolean_entity: When this entity is 'on', the bin is exposable. Use it to integrate non-weekly schedules or external logic.

error.invalid_rssi_thresholds: Min threshold must be greater than max threshold (closer to 0 = stronger signal).
error.no_pickup_days: Select at least one pickup day.
error.same_zone_assignment: The two zones must be different from each other.
error.no_beacons_selected: Select at least one beacon to monitor.
error.no_boolean_entity: Select a boolean entity for boolean mode.

abort.no_beacons_found: No beacons found. Verify ESPHome sensors are active with pattern sensor.*_XXXXXXXXXXXX_rssi.

init.title: Reconfigure global settings
init.description: Modify RSSI thresholds, zone assignments and debounce times. Configured bins remain unchanged.

data.zone_far: Zone for medium signal (far from antenna)
